sections.paragraph: εὐσέβεια, ας, ἡ [εὐσεβής] in NT limited to ‘devotion to and awesome respect for the deity and religious tradition’, a characteristic highly valued in the Mediterranean world and freq. associated w. δικαιοσύνη, devoutness, piety Ac 3:12; 1 Ti 2:2 al.; 2 Ti 3:5; Tit 1:1; 2 Pt 1:3, 6f. —Pl. expressions of piety 3:11.
